cliff_base.text: A narrow ledge runs along the cliff face about eight meters up. Something is wedged into a crack up there — a pack or bag, left by someone who knew this ridge.

ledge.text: The ledge is barely wide enough to stand on. The pack is there, bungee-strapped to an iron piton. Behind it, a crevice goes deeper than expected.

choices.label: Reach into the crevice and feel for more.

crevice_depth.text: Deep in the crevice, a sealed metal tin wedged tight. Prying it loose takes both hands. Inside: bandages, a sealed syringe, and a folded note you can't read.

handhold_failure.text: A handhold crumbles. You scramble and catch yourself two meters lower, scraping your palms raw.

crevice_creature.text: Something strikes from inside the crevice. You yank your arm back — deep punctures on your forearm.
